title: MetricDataQuery
description: This structure is used in both GetMetricData and PutMetricAlarm. The supported use of this structure is different for those two operations.

Id.description: A short name used to tie this object to the results in the response.

Expression.description: This field can contain a Metrics Insights query, or a metric math expression.

Label.description: A human-readable label for this metric or expression.

ReturnData.description: When used in GetMetricData, this option indicates whether to return the timestamps and raw data values of this metric.

Period.description: The granularity, in seconds, of the returned data points.

AccountId.description: The ID of the account where the metrics are located.
